heading: Simple and Secure Video Conferencing
intro: Communicate and work with ease, without compromising your sovereignty
joinInputError: Use a meeting link or code. Examples:
joinPassphraseDescription: This meeting uses basic encryption. Enter the passphrase — it's the part after the # symbol in the meeting link.
joinPassphraseWarning: If the passphrase is incorrect, you will not be able to see, hear, or read messages from other participants.
joinPassphraseError: A passphrase is required to join this encrypted meeting
joinMeetingTipContent: You can join a meeting by pasting its full link (including the # part for encrypted meetings) in the browser's address bar.

createMenu.laterOption: Create a meeting for a later date

laterMeetingDialog.heading: Your connection details
laterMeetingDialog.description: Share this information with the guests. They will be able to join the meeting without needing to sign in. This meeting is permanent and can be reused.
laterMeetingDialog.permissions: People with this link do not need your permission to join this meeting.

slide1.title: Make the switch to simplicity. Try us now!
slide1.body: Discover an intuitive and accessible solution, designed for all public agents, their partners, and much more.

slide2.title: Host group calls without limits
slide2.body: Unlimited time meetings, with smooth and high-quality communication, no matter the group size.

slide3.title: Transform your meetings with AI
slide3.body: Get accurate and actionable transcripts to boost your productivity. Feature in beta—try it now!
